competitionRules.notes: 世界杯阵容页规则配置；如 FIFA 官方竞赛规程更新，可按赛季覆盖。

attendanceSource: FootyStats · 参加人数最多的比赛

qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Corner, France. Conceded by Miguel Almirón.
Foul by Manu Koné (France).
Foul by Michael Olise (France).
Corner, France. Conceded by Júnior Alonso.
Foul by Bradley Barcola (France).
Bradley Barcola (France) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

events.description: 布拉德利·巴克拉吃到黄牌。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Manu Koné (France) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Ousmane Dembélé.

events.description: 马努·科内射门被封堵。 登贝莱参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, France. Conceded by Diego Gómez.
Corner, France. Conceded by Gustavo Velázquez.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Attempt missed. Júnior Alonso (Paraguay) left footed shot from outside the box misses to the right. Assisted by Andrés Cubas.

events.description: 朱尼尔·阿隆索射门偏出。 安德烈斯·库巴斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Diego Gómez (Paraguay) right footed shot from outside the box misses to the right.
Foul by Bradley Barcola (France).
Manu Koné (France) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt missed. Adrien Rabiot (France) left footed shot from outside the box is too high. Assisted by Ousmane Dembélé.

events.description: 阿德里安·拉比奥射门偏出。 登贝莱参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by William Saliba (France).
Mike Maignan (France) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 古斯塔沃·委拉斯开兹犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Kylian Mbappé (France) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Corner, France. Conceded by Andrés Cubas.
Gustavo Gómez (Paraguay) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 达约特·乌帕梅卡诺犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Dayot Upamecano (France).

events.description: 达约特·乌帕梅卡诺犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Ousmane Dembélé (France) left footed shot from the right side of the box is blocked. Assisted by Kylian Mbappé.

events.description: 登贝莱射门被封堵。 姆巴佩参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, France. Conceded by Júnior Alonso.
Jules Koundé (France) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Corner, France. Conceded by Omar Alderete.
Attempt missed. Manu Koné (France) right footed shot from outside the box is high and wide to the right. Assisted by Dayot Upamecano.

events.description: 马努·科内射门偏出。 达约特·乌帕梅卡诺参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Adrien Rabiot (France) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Bradley Barcola.

events.description: 阿德里安·拉比奥射门被封堵。 布拉德利·巴克拉参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Fourth official has announced 3 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时3分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Lucas Digne (France).
Michael Olise (France) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 古斯塔沃·委拉斯开兹犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Adrien Rabiot (France) left footed shot from outside the box is too high. Assisted by Manu Koné.

events.description: 阿德里安·拉比奥射门偏出。 马努·科内参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Miguel Almirón (Paraguay) left footed shot from the right side of the box is blocked.
Corner, Paraguay. Conceded by William Saliba.
Corner, France. Conceded by Juan José Cáceres.
Attempt missed. Ousmane Dembélé (France) right footed shot from a difficult angle on the left is close, but misses to the left. Assisted by Kylian Mbappé following a corner.

events.description: 登贝莱射门偏出。 姆巴佩参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match because of an injury Orlando Gill (Paraguay).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Attempt saved. Manu Koné (France) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the top right corner by Orlando Gill (Paraguay). Assisted by Bradley Barcola.

events.description: 马努·科内射正。 布拉德利·巴克拉参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, France. Conceded by Orlando Gill.
Corner, France. Conceded by Juan José Cáceres.
Substitution, Paraguay. José Canale replaces Omar Alderete because of an injury.

events.description: 何塞·卡纳莱替补登场，换下奥马尔·阿尔德雷特。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Bradley Barcola (France) right footed shot from outside the box is too high. Assisted by Adrien Rabiot.

events.description: 布拉德利·巴克拉射门偏出。 阿德里安·拉比奥参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Paraguay. Gustavo Caballero replaces Julio Enciso because of an injury.

events.description: 古斯塔沃·卡瓦列罗替补登场，换下恩西索。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, France. Désiré Doué replaces Bradley Barcola.

events.description: 德西尔·杜埃替补登场，换下布拉德利·巴克拉。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Kylian Mbappé (France) right footed shot from outside the box is too high. Assisted by Désiré Doué.

events.description: 姆巴佩射门偏出。 德西尔·杜埃参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Penalty conceded by Diego Gómez (Paraguay) after a foul in the penalty area.
Penalty France. Désiré Doué draws a foul in the penalty area.
Delay in match because of an injury Désiré Doué (France).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
VAR Decision: Penalty France.
Goal! Paraguay 0, France 1. Kylian Mbappé (France) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom right corner.
Substitution, Paraguay. Mauricio replaces Diego Gómez.

events.description: 毛里西奥替补登场，换下迭戈·戈麦斯。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Paraguay. Gabriel Ávalos replaces Miguel Almirón.

events.description: 加布里埃尔·阿瓦洛斯替补登场，换下阿尔米隆。

qualifiers.espnText: Adrien Rabiot (France) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Foul by Kylian Mbappé (France).
Dayot Upamecano (France) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 加布里埃尔·阿瓦洛斯犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Manu Koné (France).
Manu Koné (France) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Michael Olise (France) wins a free kick in the attacking half.

events.description: 古斯塔沃·卡瓦列罗犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, France. Rayan Cherki replaces Ousmane Dembélé.

events.description: 拉扬·切尔基替补登场，换下登贝莱。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Júnior Alonso (Paraguay) left footed shot from outside the box misses to the right. Assisted by Mauricio.

events.description: 朱尼尔·阿隆索射门偏出。 毛里西奥参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Matías Galarza (Paraguay).
Manu Koné (France) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt saved. Kylian Mbappé (France) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Orlando Gill (Paraguay). Assisted by Désiré Doué.

events.description: 姆巴佩射正。 德西尔·杜埃参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Mauricio (Paraguay) right footed shot from outside the box is close, but misses to the left. Assisted by Matías Galarza with a headed pass.

events.description: 毛里西奥射门偏出。 马蒂亚斯·加拉扎参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Fourth official has announced 10 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时10分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Désiré Doué (France) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Michael Olise.

events.description: 德西尔·杜埃射门被封堵。 奥利塞参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Michael Olise (France) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Dayot Upamecano (France) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 古斯塔沃·卡瓦列罗犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, France. Conceded by Júnior Alonso.
Attempt saved. Kylian Mbappé (France) left footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Orlando Gill (Paraguay). Assisted by Désiré Doué.

events.description: 姆巴佩射正。 德西尔·杜埃参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Kylian Mbappé (France) left footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Orlando Gill (Paraguay).
Foul by Michael Olise (France).
Michael Olise (France) is shown the yellow card.
Corner, Paraguay. Conceded by William Saliba.
Kylian Mbappé (France) wins a free kick on the left wing.

events.description: 胡安·何塞·卡塞雷斯犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, France. Conceded by Matías Galarza.
Foul by Désiré Doué (France).
Second Half ends, Paraguay 0, France 1.
